title: lantana nivea subsp. mutabilis
intro: Lantana nivea subsp. mutabilis, also known as the changing lantana or wild sage, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lantana nivea subsp. mutabilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, which can help prevent infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
